headline: Royal Caribbean Tweaks Beverage Perks And Debt Mix As Capacity Grows
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises (NYSE:RCL) is changing its beverage packages from March 15, 2026, removing the Coca-Cola souvenir cup and Freestyle machine access from popular options. The company is also expanding its cruise offerings with new deployments and ships. Royal Caribbean has completed a $2.5b senior notes offering to refinance debt and increase financial flexibility. Royal Caribbean Cruises, traded as NYSE:RCL, operates global cruise brands that depend heavily on onboard spending and...

headline: Coca-Cola (KO) Valuation Check After Another Dividend Raise For Income Investors
summary: Coca-Cola (KO) has just approved its 64th consecutive annual dividend increase, lifting the quarterly payout from US$0.51 to US$0.53 per share and keeping income investors focused on the stock. See our latest analysis for Coca-Cola. The higher dividend comes as Coca-Cola’s share price sits at US$79.34, with a 30-day share price return of 6.06% and a 90-day gain of 12.05%, while 1-year total shareholder return is 16.37% and the 5-year total shareholder return is 81.32%, indicating that returns...
